name: Notion
tagline: All-in-one workspace for notes and docs
description: Notion combines notes, docs, wikis, and project tracking in a single flexible workspace used by teams and individuals.

name: Todoist
tagline: Simple, powerful task manager
description: Todoist helps individuals and teams organize tasks and projects with a clean interface across all major platforms.

name: Linear
tagline: Issue tracking built for speed
description: Linear is a streamlined project and issue tracking tool designed for high-performance software teams.

name: Obsidian
tagline: A knowledge base built on local Markdown files
description: Obsidian lets users write and link notes in plain Markdown, building a personal knowledge graph stored on their own device.

name: Asana
tagline: Work management for teams
description: Asana helps teams plan, track, and manage projects and tasks with timelines, boards, and automation.

name: Calendly
tagline: Automated scheduling made easy
description: Calendly eliminates back-and-forth emails by letting others book time on your calendar based on your availability.

name: GitHub
tagline: The home for all developers.
description: A platform for hosting and reviewing code, managing projects, and building software collaboratively, built on Git version control.

name: Postman
tagline: API platform for building and using APIs.
description: Postman lets developers design, test, document, and monitor APIs collaboratively across teams.

name: Vercel
tagline: Develop, preview, and ship frontend apps.
description: A cloud platform for deploying and hosting frontend frameworks like Next.js with instant previews and global edge delivery.

name: Docker
tagline: Build, share, and run containerized apps.
description: Docker provides tooling to package applications and their dependencies into portable containers for consistent development and deployment.

name: Sentry
tagline: Application monitoring and error tracking.
description: Sentry helps developers detect, triage, and fix performance issues and crashes in real time across their software stack.

name: Supabase
tagline: Open source Firebase alternative.
description: Supabase gives developers a Postgres database, authentication, instant APIs, and storage to build apps quickly.

name: ChatGPT
tagline: Conversational AI assistant for work and life.
description: OpenAI's flagship chatbot for writing, coding, research, and general Q&A, powered by GPT models.

name: Midjourney
tagline: AI image generation from text prompts.
description: A Discord-based and web tool that generates highly stylized images and art from natural language descriptions.

name: Perplexity
tagline: AI-powered answer engine.
description: A search assistant that answers questions in natural language with cited sources instead of just links.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: AI voice generation and cloning.
description: A platform for generating realistic synthetic speech and cloning voices for audio, video, and app narration.

name: Runway
tagline: AI video generation and editing.
description: Creative suite offering text-to-video, video editing, and generative AI tools for filmmakers and designers.

name: Cursor
tagline: AI-native code editor.
description: A code editor built around AI pair-programming, letting developers chat with and edit large codebases using LLMs.

name: Figma
tagline: Collaborative interface design tool
description: A browser-based design platform for creating UI, prototypes, and design systems together in real time.

name: Canva
tagline: Simple drag-and-drop design for everyone
description: An online design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and marketing materials using templates and an easy visual editor.

name: Adobe XD
tagline: UX/UI design and prototyping tool
description: Adobe's vector-based tool for designing and prototyping websites and mobile apps.

name: Sketch
tagline: Digital design toolkit for Mac
description: A vector graphics editor built for macOS focused on UI and product design workflows.

name: Dribbble
tagline: Discover the world's top designers
description: A community and portfolio platform where designers showcase work and find creative jobs.

name: Framer
tagline: Design and publish real websites
description: A design tool that lets creators build interactive prototypes and publish production-ready websites without code.

name: X (Twitter)
tagline: Real-time global conversation platform.
description: A microblogging and social networking service where users post short updates, follow others, and engage in public discourse.

name: Instagram
tagline: Photo and video sharing social network.
description: A visually-driven social platform for sharing photos, videos, stories, and reels with friends and followers worldwide.

name: Reddit
tagline: The front page of the internet.
description: A network of community-driven forums (subreddits) where users discuss topics ranging from news to niche hobbies.

name: TikTok
tagline: Short-form video social platform.
description: An app for creating, sharing, and discovering short videos set to music, driven by a powerful recommendation algorithm.

name: LinkedIn
tagline: Professional networking and career platform.
description: A social network for professionals to build connections, find jobs, and share industry content and updates.

name: Bluesky
tagline: Decentralized social networking app.
description: A Twitter-like microblogging platform built on the open AT Protocol, emphasizing user choice and portable identity.

name: Netflix
tagline: Stream movies and TV shows on demand.
description: A subscription service offering a large library of films, series, and original productions across many genres.

name: YouTube
tagline: Watch and share videos from anyone.
description: A global video platform hosting everything from user uploads to music videos, live streams, and creator content.

name: Twitch
tagline: Live streaming for gamers and creators.
description: A live-streaming platform best known for video game broadcasts, esports, and interactive creator communities.

name: Hulu
tagline: Stream TV shows, movies, and originals.
description: A U.S. streaming service offering next-day episodes, films, and exclusive original programming.

name: Disney+
tagline: Stream Disney, Pixar, Marvel, and Star Wars.
description: Disney's flagship streaming service bundling content from its major studios and franchises.

name: Vimeo
tagline: Video hosting for creators and businesses.
description: A platform for hosting, sharing, and monetizing high-quality video content, popular with filmmakers and companies.

name: Stripe
tagline: Payment infrastructure for the internet.
description: Stripe provides APIs and hosted checkout tools that let businesses accept payments, manage subscriptions, and handle billing online.

name: Shopify
tagline: Commerce platform to start and grow a business.
description: Shopify powers online stores with built-in checkout, inventory, and payment processing for merchants of all sizes.

name: PayPal
tagline: Send, receive, and checkout with a trusted wallet.
description: PayPal offers an online checkout button and digital wallet used by millions of merchants and consumers worldwide.

name: Square
tagline: Point of sale and payments for businesses.
description: Square provides in-person and online checkout tools, POS hardware, and payment processing for small and large businesses.

name: Klarna
tagline: Buy now, pay later checkout for shoppers.
description: Klarna integrates into merchant checkouts to offer installment payments and flexible financing at the point of sale.

name: Adyen
tagline: Global payments platform for enterprises.
description: Adyen offers a unified checkout and payment processing platform used by large enterprises to accept payments across channels and countries.

name: BigCommerce
tagline: Ecommerce platform with flexible checkout.
description: BigCommerce provides an open SaaS ecommerce platform with customizable checkout flows for growing online retailers.

name: Affirm
tagline: Pay-over-time checkout financing.
description: Affirm embeds installment loan options into merchant checkouts, letting shoppers split purchases into payments.

name: eBay
tagline: The original online auction marketplace.
description: A global e-commerce platform where users buy and sell goods through auctions and fixed-price listings.

name: Sotheby's
tagline: Fine art and luxury auction house.
description: A leading global auction house selling art, jewelry, and collectibles both in-person and online.

name: Christie's
tagline: Renowned auction house for art and collectibles.
description: A historic auction house offering live and online sales of fine art, watches, and rare items.

name: Copart
tagline: Online vehicle auctions.
description: A global platform for buying and selling used, wholesale, and salvage vehicles through online auctions.

name: Heritage Auctions
tagline: World's largest collectibles auctioneer.
description: An auction house specializing in coins, comics, art, and memorabilia with live and online bidding.

name: Catawiki
tagline: Curated online auctions for special objects.
description: A European online marketplace where expert-vetted lots in art, design, and collectibles are sold via weekly auctions.

name: GovDeals
tagline: Online auctions for government surplus.
description: A marketplace where government agencies and public entities sell surplus equipment and assets via online auction.

name: Foundation
tagline: NFT auction marketplace for digital art.
description: An Ethereum-based platform where creators mint and sell digital art through timed auctions to collectors.

name: Duolingo
tagline: Learn a language for free, forever
description: A gamified language-learning app offering bite-sized lessons in dozens of languages with streaks and leaderboards to keep learners engaged.

name: Strava
tagline: Track your runs and rides
description: A social fitness network that lets athletes record workouts via GPS, compare segments, and share activity with friends.

name: Desmos
tagline: Free online graphing calculator
description: An advanced graphing calculator and math tool used by students and teachers to visualize functions and equations interactively.

name: Headspace
tagline: Meditation and mindfulness made simple
description: A guided meditation and sleep app that helps users reduce stress and build daily mindfulness habits.

name: Trello
tagline: Organize anything with boards and cards
description: A visual project management tool built around Kanban-style boards, lists, and cards for organizing tasks and workflows.

name: Airbnb
tagline: Book unique homes and experiences
description: A global marketplace connecting travelers with hosts offering short-term lodging and local experiences worldwide.

name: Spotify
tagline: Music and podcasts for everyone
description: A streaming platform giving users on-demand access to millions of songs, podcasts, and curated playlists.

name: Audible
tagline: Audiobooks and podcasts on demand
description: An audiobook and spoken-word entertainment service offering a vast library of titles for listening on the go.

name: Steam
tagline: The world's largest PC gaming platform.
description: A digital storefront and community platform for buying, playing, and discussing PC games, run by Valve.

name: Epic Games Store
tagline: PC and Mac game storefront with free weekly games.
description: A digital game marketplace from Epic Games known for exclusive titles and its recurring free game giveaways.

name: Roblox
tagline: Platform for playing and creating user-generated games.
description: An online platform and game creation system letting users build, share, and play millions of user-generated 3D experiences.

name: Minecraft
tagline: Sandbox game about placing blocks and going on adventures.
description: A best-selling sandbox video game by Mojang where players build, explore, and survive in procedurally generated worlds.

name: GOG
tagline: DRM-free PC game store and preservation platform.
description: A digital distribution platform selling DRM-free games, with a focus on classics and game preservation.

name: itch.io
tagline: Open marketplace for independent digital creators.
description: A storefront and hosting platform where indie developers publish and sell games, tools, and other creative work.

name: EA (Electronic Arts)
tagline: Major publisher behind franchises like FIFA and Battlefield.
description: A leading video game publisher and developer producing sports, action, and simulation titles played by millions worldwide.

name: PlayStation
tagline: Sony's console gaming ecosystem and online store.
description: Sony's gaming platform encompassing PlayStation consoles, digital storefront, and the PlayStation Network online service.

name: Snapshot
tagline: Gasless voting for web3 communities
description: A decentralized voting platform that lets DAOs and token holders create proposals and vote off-chain without paying gas fees.

name: Compound
tagline: Algorithmic money markets governed by token holders
description: A DeFi lending protocol whose interest rate models and treasury are controlled through on-chain governance proposals voted on by COMP holders.

name: Uniswap
tagline: The leading decentralized exchange, run by its community
description: An automated market maker protocol whose fee switches, treasury grants, and upgrades are decided through UNI token governance votes.

name: Aragon
tagline: Infrastructure for creating and running DAOs
description: A platform that provides tools for launching decentralized organizations with customizable on-chain voting and governance modules.

name: Tally
tagline: Home for on-chain governance
description: A governance dashboard where token holders can view proposals, delegate voting power, and cast on-chain votes across dozens of DAOs.

name: Boardable
tagline: Board management software for nonprofits and companies
description: A web2 SaaS platform that helps organizations manage board meetings, voting, minutes, and document sharing for corporate governance.

name: Diligent
tagline: Governance, risk, and compliance software for boards
description: An enterprise platform used by boards of directors and executives to manage governance workflows, secure meetings, and compliance reporting.

name: MakerDAO
tagline: Decentralized stablecoin protocol governed by MKR holders
description: The organization behind the DAI stablecoin, where MKR token holders vote on risk parameters, collateral types, and protocol upgrades.

name: Etherscan
tagline: The Ethereum blockchain explorer.
description: Etherscan lets anyone browse transactions, blocks, addresses, and smart contracts on the Ethereum blockchain in real time.

name: Solscan
tagline: Solana blockchain explorer and analytics.
description: Solscan provides detailed insights into Solana transactions, tokens, NFTs, and programs for developers and users alike.

name: Dune
tagline: Query and visualize blockchain data.
description: Dune lets anyone write SQL queries against indexed blockchain data and build shareable dashboards for crypto analytics.

name: Nansen
tagline: On-chain analytics platform for crypto investors.
description: Nansen combines wallet labeling with on-chain data to help traders and funds track smart money and market trends.

name: mempool.space
tagline: Bitcoin blockchain and mempool explorer.
description: mempool.space visualizes the Bitcoin mempool and blockchain, showing fees, blocks, and transactions in real time.

name: DeBank
tagline: Track your on-chain crypto portfolio.
description: DeBank aggregates wallet balances and DeFi positions across chains, giving users a unified view of their on-chain assets.

name: Arkham
tagline: Deanonymize blockchain activity.
description: Arkham Intelligence maps on-chain addresses to real-world entities, helping users research and monitor crypto transactions.

name: Glassnode
tagline: On-chain market intelligence for crypto assets.
description: Glassnode provides advanced on-chain metrics and indicators used by traders and institutions to gauge network health and market sentiment.

name: Topps
tagline: Iconic trading cards and collectibles since 1938.
description: Publisher of sports and entertainment trading cards, stickers, and collectible memorabilia sold worldwide.

name: PSA
tagline: Authentication and grading for trading cards and collectibles.
description: The leading third-party grading service for trading cards, autographs, and memorabilia, providing authentication and population data collectors rely on.

name: Funko
tagline: Pop culture vinyl figures and collectibles.
description: Designer and manufacturer of Funko Pop! vinyl figures and other licensed pop-culture collectibles spanning movies, games, and music.

name: eBay Collectibles
tagline: The world's largest marketplace for collectibles.
description: A dedicated hub on eBay where collectors buy and sell trading cards, coins, stamps, comics, and countless other collectible categories.

name: StockX
tagline: Marketplace for sneakers, streetwear, and collectibles.
description: A live-market platform where authenticated sneakers, trading cards, apparel, and other collectibles are bought and sold at real-time prices.

name: OpenSea
tagline: The largest marketplace for NFTs and digital collectibles.
description: A leading NFT marketplace where users can discover, buy, and sell digital collectibles including art, gaming items, and profile pictures across multiple chains.

name: PCGS
tagline: Grading and authentication for rare coins and collectibles.
description: A trusted third-party grading service for rare coins and banknotes, giving collectors standardized authentication and valuation.

name: Rally
tagline: Fractional ownership platform for rare collectibles.
description: A platform that lets everyday investors buy shares in high-value collectibles like classic cars, comics, and memorabilia through equity crowdfunding.

name: Safe
tagline: The most trusted multisig wallet for Ethereum and EVM chains.
description: Safe (formerly Gnosis Safe) lets teams and individuals manage digital assets with multiple required signers, securing billions in crypto across EVM chains.

name: Casa
tagline: Multisig bitcoin key management for self-custody.
description: Casa provides multisignature and multi-key vaults for securely storing bitcoin, helping users avoid single points of failure in self-custody.

name: Unchained
tagline: Collaborative multisig custody for bitcoin holders.
description: Unchained combines multisig vaults with concierge onboarding and inheritance planning to give bitcoin holders secure, collaborative custody.

name: Fireblocks
tagline: Institutional platform for securing digital asset operations.
description: Fireblocks offers MPC and multisig-based custody, transfer, and settlement infrastructure used by exchanges, banks, and enterprises to manage crypto assets.

name: BitGo
tagline: Multisig and custody infrastructure for institutional crypto.
description: BitGo pioneered multisig wallet technology and now provides regulated custody, staking, and wallet infrastructure for institutions across many blockchains.

name: Electrum
tagline: Fast, lightweight bitcoin wallet with multisig support.
description: Electrum is a longstanding open-source bitcoin wallet that supports multisignature wallet setups alongside hardware wallet integration.

name: Sparrow Wallet
tagline: Desktop bitcoin wallet built for privacy and multisig.
description: Sparrow is a desktop bitcoin wallet focused on privacy, transparency, and easy setup of multisig vaults with hardware wallets and coordinators.

name: Gnosis Guild
tagline: Tooling for DAOs and multisig-governed on-chain organizations.
description: Gnosis Guild builds modular governance and permissions tooling, such as Zodiac, that extends Safe multisig wallets into full on-chain organizations.

name: 1Password
tagline: Password manager and digital vault.
description: 1Password securely stores passwords, logins, and sensitive documents across all your devices with strong encryption.

name: Dropbox
tagline: Cloud storage and file sync.
description: Dropbox lets individuals and teams store, sync, and share files securely across devices from anywhere.

name: Tailscale
tagline: Zero-config secure networking.
description: Tailscale creates encrypted mesh VPN networks between your devices in minutes using WireGuard, no complex configuration required.

name: 1Blocker
tagline: Ad and tracker blocker for Safari.
description: 1Blocker removes ads, trackers, and cookie notices from Safari on Mac and iOS to speed up browsing and protect privacy.

name: Malwarebytes
tagline: Anti-malware and antivirus protection.
description: Malwarebytes scans and removes malware, ransomware, and other threats to keep computers and devices secure.

name: CCleaner
tagline: System cleanup and optimization tool.
description: CCleaner frees up disk space and speeds up PCs by clearing temporary files, browser caches, and unused registry entries.

name: HandBrake
tagline: Free open-source video transcoder.
description: HandBrake converts video files between formats and compresses them for smaller sizes with a wide range of device presets.

name: 7-Zip
tagline: Free file archiver with high compression.
description: 7-Zip compresses and extracts files in formats like 7z and ZIP, offering a high compression ratio and open-source licensing.
